x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: Preventive maintenance data enables Now Assist FSM to recommend proactive service before equipment failure.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Capture all preventive maintenance activities as work orders with type=preventive. Document outcomes in resolution notes and link to asset records. Target: 100+ closed PM work orders in the trailing 24 months.

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_03f81dc7cfd587108935fb251d851cc0
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="x_snc_airop_check_definition"><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><ai_justification><![CDATA[Preventive maintenance data enables Now Assist FSM to recommend proactive service before equipment failure.]]></ai_justification><check_name>FSM Preventive Maintenance Data</check_name><check_script><![CDATA[(function(checkDef, dateFilter) {
    // 24-month window for PM data — PM cycles are typically quarterly/annual
    // so 12 months may be too narrow to capture full PM history
    var cutoff = new GlideDateTime();
    cutoff.addYearsUTC(-2);

    var ga = new GlideAggregate('wm_order');
    ga.addQuery('type', 'preventive');
    ga.addQuery('state', 'closed');
    ga.addQuery('closed_at', '>=', cutoff.getValue());
    ga.addAggregate('COUNT');
    ga.query();
    var count = ga.next() ? parseInt(ga.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    var actualValue = count + ' closed preventive maintenance work orders (last 24 months)';

    if (count >= 100) {
        return {
            status: 'ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: count + ' preventive maintenance records in the last 24 months. Now Assist FSM has sufficient PM history for AI predictive maintenance recommendations.'
        };
    } else if (count >= 20) {
        return {
            status: 'needs_attention',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'Only ' + count + ' preventive maintenance records in the last 24 months (target: 100+). Now Assist FSM predictive maintenance AI will have limited historical coverage.'
        };
    } else {
        return {
            status: 'not_ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'Only ' + count + ' preventive maintenance records in the last 24 months. Insufficient PM history for Now Assist FSM to provide meaningful predictive maintenance AI recommendations.'
        };
    }
})]]></check_script><is_active>true</is_active><is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive><is_manual>false</is_manual><module>FIELD_SERVICE</module><number>CHK0000441</number><order>140</order><remediation_guidance>Capture all preventive maintenance activities as work orders with type=preventive. Document outcomes in resolution notes and link to asset records. Target: 100+ closed PM work orders in the trailing 24 months.</remediation_guidance><sys_class_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-06-10 06:41:19</sys_created_on><sys_id>03f81dc7cfd587108935fb251d851cc0</sys_id><sys_mod_count>1</sys_mod_count><sys_name>FSM Preventive Maintenance Data</sys_name><sys_package display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform" source="x_snc_airop">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_scope><sys_update_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition_03f81dc7cfd587108935fb251d851cc0</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-06-10 06:54:01</sys_updated_on></x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>
